# Story 2.1: Menu Read API + Frontend Menu Cache (Dexie + useLiveQuery)

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-11. -->

## Story

As a cashier,
I want POS frontend pull menu (categories, products, option groups, options) từ server và cache vào IndexedDB,
so that POS hiển thị danh sách sản phẩm cả khi online và offline (sau lần pull đầu tiên).

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **Backend menu read endpoint:** Given schema seed có categories + products + option_groups + options, when developer triển khai backend `GET /api/v1/menu` trong `src/menu/menu-sync.controller.ts`, then endpoint yêu cầu Bearer token (`cashier` hoặc `admin`), auto-scope qua Prisma `$extends`, và response 200 body `{ menuVersion: <int>, categories: [...], products: [...], optionGroups: [...] }` camelCase JSON.
2. **Product DTO shape:** Product trong response có `{ id, name, categoryId, priceVnd: integer, isActive, sortOrder, optionGroupIds: [] }`; `priceVnd` là integer VND, không float.
3. **Option group DTO shape:** Option group trong response có `{ id, name, isRequired, minSelect, maxSelect, sortOrder, options: [{ id, label, priceDeltaVnd: integer, isDefault, sortOrder }] }`; `label` lấy từ Prisma `Option.name` để khớp contract FE.
4. **Dexie menu schema:** Given Dexie từ Story 1.8, when developer mở `pos-web/src/db/schemas/menu.ts`, then Dexie có các bảng `categories`, `products`, `optionGroups`, `options`, `menuMeta` (single-row metadata với `menuVersion`, `lastPulledAt`) với indexes theo `categoryId`, `isActive`, `sortOrder`.
5. **Atomic pullMenu:** Given sync logic, when developer mở `features/menu/sync.ts`, then function `pullMenu()` gọi `GET /api/v1/menu` và ghi atomic qua `db.transaction('rw', [...tables])`; không để cache half-written nếu lỗi giữa chừng.
6. **Pull triggers:** `pullMenu` được trigger khi app boot online, khi recovery từ offline → online, và manual call API/hook có thể dùng cho các story sau. Manual UI button không cần build trong story này nếu chưa có UI.
7. **Reactive hooks:** Given hooks `useCategories()` và `useProducts({ categoryId?, search? })`, when component dùng hooks, then hooks dùng Dexie `useLiveQuery` để render reactive, trả `undefined` khi đang load, và filter active products only (`isActive=false` không hiển thị).
8. **Offline reload:** Given đã pull menu thành công, when user reload app khi offline, then menu hiển thị đầy đủ từ Dexie cache không cần network.
9. **Performance:** `useProducts()` trả kết quả trong <300ms với seed demo; sort theo `sortOrder` rồi `name` để chuẩn bị cho Story 2.2.
10. **Regression gates:** Required gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`; `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Backend menu module + endpoint (AC: 1,2,3)
  - [x] Add `src/menu/menu.module.ts`, `src/menu/menu-sync.controller.ts`, `src/menu/menu.service.ts`, `src/menu/repositories/menu.repository.ts`.
  - [x] Register `MenuModule` in `AppModule`.
  - [x] Protect endpoint with existing `JwtAuthGuard` and `RolesGuard`; allow `Role.Cashier` and `Role.Admin`.
  - [x] Use `@TenantContext()` from JWT context; do not accept tenant/store from query/body.
  - [x] Return plain JSON success, not envelope; errors must flow through `ProblemDetailsFilter`.
- [x] Backend repository/query mapping (AC: 1,2,3)
  - [x] Query `menuVersion`, `categories`, `products`, `optionGroups`, `options`, and product-option-group join using Prisma service with tenant/store scope.
  - [x] Preserve active flags in payload; do not filter inactive in backend unless explicitly stated. FE hooks filter active products for display.
  - [x] Map `Option.name` → response `label`; map `ProductOptionGroup` → product `optionGroupIds` sorted by join `sortOrder` then option group sort.
  - [x] Ensure categories/products/optionGroups/options sorted by `sortOrder`, then stable name/label.
- [x] Backend tests (AC: 1,2,3,10)
  - [x] Controller test verifies guards/roles metadata or request behavior where practical.
  - [x] Service/repository tests verify response shape, option mapping, menuVersion fallback/lookup, sorting, and no tenant/store query params.
  - [x] Add e2e or integration-style test if existing test setup can cover authenticated `GET /api/v1/menu` cheaply.
- [x] Frontend Dexie schema expansion (AC: 4,8)
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/db/schemas/menu.ts` types for `MenuCategoryRecord`, `MenuProductRecord`, `MenuOptionGroupRecord`, `MenuOptionRecord`, `MenuMetaRecord`.
  - [x] Update `pos-web/src/db/dexie.ts` to expose `categories`, `products`, `optionGroups`, `options`, `menuMeta`; keep existing `session` and `orders` tables intact.
  - [x] Bump Dexie schema version; do not destroy `session` data during migration.
- [x] Frontend menu API + sync (AC: 5,6,8)
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/features/menu/types.ts`, `api.ts`, `sync.ts`.
  - [x] `fetchMenu()` uses existing `apiClient`/auth interceptor; no duplicate token logic.
  - [x] `pullMenu()` writes all menu tables and `menuMeta` in one Dexie transaction; store `lastPulledAt` as ISO UTC string or epoch consistently and document type.
  - [x] Trigger boot pull only when online and authenticated; failure should not logout or block POS shell if cached menu exists.
  - [x] Add online recovery listener/hook/service with cleanup to avoid StrictMode duplicate triggers.
- [x] Frontend hooks (AC: 7,8,9)
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/features/menu/hooks.ts` with `useCategories()` and `useProducts({ categoryId?, search? })` using `useLiveQuery`.
  - [x] Return `undefined` while Dexie query is pending.
  - [x] Filter products by `isActive`, optional `categoryId`, and optional case-insensitive search. Vietnamese accent normalization is fully required in Story 2.2, but implementation here may include it if simple.
  - [x] Sort products by `sortOrder` then `name`; categories by `sortOrder` then `name`.
- [x] Frontend tests (AC: 4,5,7,8,9,10)
  - [x] Test Dexie schema/table availability and migration preserves `session`.
  - [x] Test `pullMenu()` atomic replace/write and metadata update.
  - [x] Test hooks return cached offline data without network and active-only filtering.
  - [x] Test boot/online trigger cleanup does not double-call under repeated mount/cleanup.
- [x] Run gates and update Dev Agent Record (AC: 10)
  - [x] Run both backend and frontend command sets.
  - [x] Record logs, completion notes, and file list.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns: read-only backend menu snapshot endpoint, FE menu cache schema, pull/cache sync function, reactive Dexie hooks, app boot/online trigger integration.
- This story does **not** own: POS product grid UI (Story 2.2), OptionModal (Story 2.3), cart/order build/sync, Admin menu CRUD, versioned incremental `GET /menu?since_version=N` (Story 3.8), or visual manual sync panel (Story 2.11).
- Keep endpoint simple full snapshot for Story 2.1. Architecture mentions future `since_version`; do not overbuild delta logic unless it is trivial and backward compatible.

### Current implementation state to preserve

- `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma` already has `Category`, `Product`, `OptionGroup`, `Option`, `ProductOptionGroup`, and `MenuVersion` models with `tenantId`/`storeId`, sort fields, active flags, and DB mappings. Reuse these; do not change schema for this story unless tests prove a missing field. [Source: `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`]
- `pos-api/src/prisma/tenant-scope.extension.ts` and `PrismaService` implement tenant/store scoping. Menu repository must use injected Prisma service and tenant context, not raw SQL. [Source: Project Context §2; `pos-api/src/prisma/*`]
- Existing auth decorators/guards: `@CurrentUser`, `@TenantContext`, `@Roles`, `JwtAuthGuard`, `RolesGuard`. Use existing patterns rather than creating duplicates. [Source: `pos-api/src/common/*`; Story 1.5/1.6]
- `pos-web/src/db/dexie.ts` currently has `session`, placeholder `orders`, placeholder `menu`. Replace/expand placeholder `menu` carefully; preserve session object store and indexes. [Source: `pos-web/src/db/dexie.ts`]
- `pos-web/src/shared/lib/api-client.ts` is the shared axios client with interceptor installed by app. Menu API must use this and must not import auth token storage directly. [Source: Story 1.8/1.9]
- `pos-web/src/features/auth/session-boot-provider.tsx` already manages boot lifecycle. Integrate menu pull without delaying session boot or protected rendering indefinitely. Cached offline POS should still render. [Source: Story 1.9]

### Architecture and guardrails

- Source of truth on conflict: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md`.
- Backend layering: Controller → Service → Repository → PrismaService. Controller validates auth/roles and delegates; service maps business DTO; repository is Prisma-only. No business logic in `common/`.
- API path must be `/api/v1/menu` through existing global prefix. Use REST plain success JSON; errors through RFC 7807 `ProblemDetailsFilter`.
- Naming: DB snake_case, Prisma camelCase/PascalCase, API camelCase JSON. Do not expose DB `snake_case` in JSON.
- Multi-tenant: every business DB query must be tenant/store scoped via Prisma `$extends`/context. No unscoped `$queryRaw`.
- VND money fields are integer: `priceVnd`, `priceDeltaVnd`.
- Token rule: FE must not use `localStorage`/`sessionStorage`; no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
- FE layering: `routes/` may import `features/` and `shared/`; `features/menu` may import `shared/` and `db/`; `shared/` must not import `features/` or `db/`.

### File structure guidance

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-api/src/
├── app.module.ts                         # UPDATE register MenuModule
└── menu/
    ├── menu.module.ts                    # NEW
    ├── menu-sync.controller.ts           # NEW GET /menu
    ├── menu.service.ts                   # NEW response mapping/orchestration
    ├── menu.service.spec.ts              # NEW
    └── repositories/
        ├── menu.repository.ts            # NEW Prisma reads
        └── menu.repository.spec.ts       # NEW if practical

pos-web/src/
├── db/
│   ├── dexie.ts                          # UPDATE tables/version
│   └── schemas/menu.ts                   # NEW menu record types
├── features/menu/
│   ├── api.ts                            # NEW fetchMenu
│   ├── hooks.ts                          # NEW useLiveQuery hooks
│   ├── sync.ts                           # NEW pullMenu + trigger helper
│   ├── types.ts                          # NEW API/types
│   └── *.test.ts(x)                      # NEW tests
└── features/auth/session-boot-provider.tsx or route shell # UPDATE only for boot/online trigger wiring
```

### UX/accessibility notes

- Story 2.1 primarily enables data. Do not build final ProductGrid UI yet.
- Cached offline menu is normal state, not an error. If adding any small status text/toast, keep Vietnamese and non-technical.
- Future UI must hide inactive products; implement this at hook level now to prevent Story 2.2 mistakes.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 1.8 established IndexedDB session storage and axios interceptor; do not bypass them.
- Story 1.9 established protected POS boot offline behavior and emphasized not blocking valid offline sessions on network refresh. Menu pull should follow same rule: best-effort online, cached offline.
- A prior review fixed `shared -> features` layering violation in `api-client`; do not reintroduce imports from `shared` into `features/auth` or vice versa incorrectly.
- Existing gates for Story 1.9 passed with Vitest/React Router tests; match this testing style.

### Testing Standards

- Backend: Jest unit tests for service/controller/repository. E2E only if setup is stable and does not add excessive fixture work.
- Frontend: Vitest; use fake/in-memory Dexie database names per test and cleanup after tests. Use React Testing Library only if testing hooks/components; otherwise pure async tests for sync.
- Required command set:

```bash
cd pos-api && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
```

## Dev Agent Record

### Agent Model Used

vllm/cx/gpt-5.5

### Debug Log References

- `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` — PASS, 10 suites / 30 tests.
- `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` — PASS, 8 files / 27 tests; Vite emitted existing chunk-size warning only.
- Re-review fix gate: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test -- menu && npm run build` — PASS, 1 file / 6 menu sync tests.

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented read-only `GET /api/v1/menu` with `JwtAuthGuard`, `RolesGuard`, `@Roles('cashier','admin')`, and `@TenantContext()`; no tenant/store query/body input accepted.
- Added menu repository/service mapping for menu version, categories, products, option groups, options, and option group IDs; money fields remain integer VND and option `name` maps to API `label`.
- Expanded Dexie to version 2 with `categories`, `products`, `optionGroups`, `options`, and `menuMeta`, preserving existing session/orders tables.
- Added frontend `fetchMenu()`, `pullMenu()`, atomic Dexie transaction write, boot pull, offline→online recovery, and best-effort failure handling so cached/offline shell is not blocked.
- Added `useCategories()` and `useProducts({ categoryId?, search? })` with `useLiveQuery`, active-product filtering, optional category/search filter, and sort by `sortOrder` then Vietnamese name compare.
- Added backend Jest tests and frontend Vitest/fake-indexeddb tests for DTO mapping, controller context behavior, sync write/pull, metadata, session preservation, failure propagation, online listener cleanup, and recovery failure handling.
- ✅ Resolved review finding [patch]: online recovery listener now catches rejected pull promises locally to avoid unhandled promise rejections while preserving manual `triggerMenuPull()` error propagation.
